patterns.reason: First Bun upstream tier: direct Bun JavaScript API tests under test/js/bun.
Bun shell parser/runtime conformance needs a dedicated implementation pass; individual smoke tests are re-enabled explicitly.
Bun.spawn conformance needs a dedicated implementation pass; individual smoke tests are re-enabled explicitly.
Bun.sqlite conformance needs a dedicated implementation pass.
Bun test-runner conformance needs a dedicated implementation pass; individual smoke tests are re-enabled explicitly.
Bun utility API conformance needs a dedicated implementation pass; individual smoke tests are re-enabled explicitly.
